description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means A calls B. The `node` field is the k8s node a service's pods are scheduled on — co-location is NOT a call edge but can couple failures.

edges.note: dashboard-svc dispatches async tasks to its worker (on a DIFFERENT node)

note: dashboard-svc, sbom-scanner and log-agent-v1 sit in THREE different namespaces (dashboard-svc, rad, default) with NO service-call edge between them. dashboard-svc only calls dashboard-worker, which runs on a different node and stays healthy. log-agent-v1 is a DaemonSet with no inbound/outbound service edges. The only thing the three failing pods share is node ip-10-0-37-88.us-east-1.
